items.suspected_error: This Shabbos falls on 11 Adar; per the next sheet's own heading ('The week of Ki Sissa and Purim', 12–18 Adar), Purim (14 Adar) and the Megillah readings occur the FOLLOWING week, not this Shabbos/Motzaei Shabbos. No Megillah time is actually printed under this heading. Likely a mislabeled or leftover header.
